rules.rule_text:
rule TrojanDllpatcherA
{
	meta:
		Description = "Trojan.Dllpatcher.vb"
		ThreatLevel = "5"

	strings:
		$str1 = "Global\\Matil da" ascii wide
		$str2 = "Global\\Nople Mento" ascii wide
		$str3 = "%s\\System32\\dnsapi.dll" ascii wide
		$str4 = "%s\\SysWOW64\\dnsapi.dll" ascii wide

	condition:
		3 of them
}
